description: Style NoteVintage jeans from peter england add classic styling to your casual look. Pair these with a good shirt and some leather shoes for a look that will ensure a second date and a bucket load of compliments!Product DetailsBlack jeans, has a slightly washed look, low waist, buttoned and zippered closure, belt loops around the waist, brand patch on the waist at the back, two insert pockets in front with a coin pocket inside the right pocket and two patch pockets at the back with stitched detailMaterial and Care99% cotton and 1% spandexWash separatelyDo not bleachDrip dry Warm ironSize and FitSlim fit, Low waistThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
